## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance

## Testing

- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile dlna_push.py screenloop/*.py tests/*.py`
- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] Docker build or compose run tested
- [ ] Manual TV/device test, if playback behavior changed

## Notes

Mention migrations, config changes, screenshots, compatibility risks, or security-sensitive behavior.
